title: Japanese Pork Pie
description: A twist on the classic meat pie, this Japanese-inspired dish features a crumbly crust and savory pork filling. Serve as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Roll out the pie crust and place in a pie dish.
In a pan, cook the pork over medium heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the soy sauce and green onions to the pan and stir to combine.
Pour the pork mixture into the pie crust.
Dot the top of the pie with the melted buttery.
Roll out the remaining pie crust and use to cover the pie.
Crimp the edges of the crust to seal the pie.
Cut a few slits in the top of the pie to allow steam to escape.
Bake the pie for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie rest for 10 minutes before serving.
